requirements.title: Zone::to_string returns unique human-readable name
requirements.text: rcp::to_string(Zone) shall return a unique, non-empty, human-readable string for each defined Zone constant. Two distinct Zone constants shall never return the same string.

requirements.title: Zone::Unknown has value 0
requirements.text: Zone::Unknown shall have the numeric value 0, making it the zero value of the Zone type and a safe default for uninitialized variables.

requirements.title: Zone::FrontLeft has value 1
requirements.text: Zone::FrontLeft shall have the numeric value 1.

requirements.title: Zone::FrontRight has value 2
requirements.text: Zone::FrontRight shall have the numeric value 2.

requirements.title: Zone::RearLeft has value 3
requirements.text: Zone::RearLeft shall have the numeric value 3.

requirements.title: Zone::RearRight has value 4
requirements.text: Zone::RearRight shall have the numeric value 4.

requirements.title: Zone::Central has value 5
requirements.text: Zone::Central shall have the numeric value 5.

requirements.title: All named Zone constants are distinct
requirements.text: Zone::FrontLeft, Zone::FrontRight, Zone::RearLeft, Zone::RearRight, and Zone::Central shall each have a different numeric value from every other named zone constant.

requirements.title: Priority::Normal has value 0
requirements.text: Priority::Normal shall have the numeric value 0, making it the zero value of Priority and the safe default for Command fields left unset.

requirements.title: Priority::High is greater than Priority::Normal
requirements.text: The numeric value of Priority::High shall be strictly greater than Priority::Normal.

requirements.title: Priority::Critical is greater than Priority::High
requirements.text: The numeric value of Priority::Critical shall be strictly greater than Priority::High.

requirements.title: CommandType::Noop has value 0
requirements.text: CommandType::Noop shall have the numeric value 0. An uninitialized Command.type shall be interpreted as a safe no-op.

requirements.title: CommandType::Set has value 1
requirements.text: CommandType::Set shall have the numeric value 1.

requirements.title: CommandType::Get has value 2
requirements.text: CommandType::Get shall have the numeric value 2.

requirements.title: CommandType::Reset has value 3
requirements.text: CommandType::Reset shall have the numeric value 3.

requirements.title: CommandType::Watchdog has value 4
requirements.text: CommandType::Watchdog shall have the numeric value 4. The watchdog kick command shall be a stable, named constant.

requirements.title: All CommandType constants are distinct
requirements.text: CommandType::Noop, Set, Get, Reset, and Watchdog shall each have a different numeric value.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::to_string returns unique human-readable name
requirements.text: rcp::to_string(ResponseStatus) shall return a unique, non-empty, human-readable string for each defined ResponseStatus constant.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::OK has value 0
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::OK shall have the numeric value 0. An uninitialized Response.status shall be interpreted as success.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::Error has value 1
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::Error shall have the numeric value 1.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::Timeout has value 2
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::Timeout shall have the numeric value 2.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::Busy has value 3
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::Busy shall have the numeric value 3.

requirements.title: All ResponseStatus constants are distinct
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::OK, Error, Timeout, Busy, and Unknown shall each have a different numeric value.

requirements.title: ErrClosed is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrClosed shall evaluate to true in a boolean context so callers can distinguish it from a default (zero) error_code.

requirements.title: ErrNotFound is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrNotFound shall be truthy.

requirements.title: ErrAlreadyExists is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrAlreadyExists shall be truthy.

requirements.title: ErrTimeout is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrTimeout shall be truthy.

requirements.title: ErrBusy is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrBusy shall be truthy.

requirements.title: All sentinel errors are mutually distinct
requirements.text: ErrClosed, ErrNotFound, ErrAlreadyExists, ErrTimeout, ErrBusy, and ErrZoneMismatch shall all be distinct std::error_code values (different value or category).

requirements.title: ErrClosed detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned by a closed Controller or Registry shall compare equal to ErrClosed. Callers must be able to detect closed-entity conditions without parsing error strings.

requirements.title: ErrNotFound detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned for a missing zone lookup shall compare equal to ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: ErrAlreadyExists detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned for a duplicate zone registration shall compare equal to ErrAlreadyExists.

requirements.title: ErrTimeout detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned due to a context deadline expiry shall compare equal to ErrTimeout.

requirements.title: ErrZoneMismatch is a distinct truthy sentinel error
requirements.text: ErrZoneMismatch shall be truthy and distinct from all other sentinel errors so callers can detect zone-misrouting without parsing error strings.

requirements.title: Zero-value Command is a safe no-op
requirements.text: A zero-initialised Command shall have zone=Zone::Unknown, type=CommandType::Noop, and priority=Priority::Normal.

requirements.title: Command.payload may be empty
requirements.text: Command.payload shall be optional; an empty payload shall be accepted by any Controller::send implementation without error or crash.

requirements.title: Response.command_id echoes the originating Command.id
requirements.text: Controller::send shall return a Response whose command_id field equals the id field of the submitted Command.

requirements.title: Response.zone identifies the zone that processed the command
requirements.text: Controller::send shall return a Response whose zone field equals the Zone of the Controller that processed the command.

requirements.title: Zero-value Response has ResponseStatus::OK
requirements.text: A zero-initialised Response shall have status=ResponseStatus::OK (value 0).

requirements.title: Status.zone identifies the publishing controller
requirements.text: Every Status published by a Controller shall carry a zone field equal to the Controller's declared zone.

requirements.title: Status.seq is monotonically increasing
requirements.text: Each successive Status published by a given Controller instance shall have a seq value strictly greater than the previous one.

requirements.title: Status.healthy is true while the controller is open
requirements.text: A Status published by a Controller that has not yet been closed shall carry healthy=true.

requirements.title: Status.payload carries the bytes passed to publish
requirements.text: Status.payload in every delivered Status update shall be byte-for-byte identical to the payload argument supplied to the publish call that produced it.

requirements.title: Status.payload may be empty
requirements.text: publish shall accept an empty payload without error or crash. The resulting Status.payload shall be empty.

requirements.title: Controller::send returns StatusOK with no handler
requirements.text: When no Handler is configured, Controller::send shall return a Response with status=ResponseStatus::OK.

requirements.title: Controller::send dispatches to the configured handler
requirements.text: When a Handler is configured, Controller::send shall invoke the handler exactly once per send call and return the handler's Response.

requirements.title: Controller::send rejected after close
requirements.text: Controller::send called after Controller::close shall return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Controller::send respects an already-done context
requirements.text: If the Context passed to Controller::send is already done at call time, send shall return ErrTimeout without invoking the handler.

requirements.title: Controller::close is idempotent
requirements.text: Controller::close shall be safe to call multiple times. Every call after the first shall return a success error_code without side effects.

requirements.title: Published Status is delivered to all active subscribers
requirements.text: A Status produced by publish shall be received by every channel returned by an active subscribe call on the same controller.

requirements.title: Subscribe channels are closed when the controller closes
requirements.text: When Controller::close is called, all channels previously returned by subscribe shall be closed.

requirements.title: Subscribe rejected after close
requirements.text: Controller::subscribe called after Controller::close shall return ErrClosed. No channel shall be returned.

requirements.title: Controller::zone returns the declared zone
requirements.text: Controller::zone shall return the Zone value provided at construction time for the lifetime of the controller.

requirements.title: Subscribe seq values are strictly increasing
requirements.text: Successive Status updates received on a subscribe channel shall carry strictly increasing seq values.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel is closed when its context is done
requirements.text: When the Context passed to subscribe becomes done, the channel returned by that subscribe call shall be closed.

requirements.title: Multiple concurrent subscribers each receive published Status
requirements.text: When multiple subscribe calls are active on the same controller, each returned channel shall independently receive every Status published via publish.

requirements.title: CommandType::Noop is accepted without error
requirements.text: Controller::send with Command.type=CommandType::Noop shall return ResponseStatus::OK and shall not return an error.

requirements.title: CommandType::Watchdog is accepted without error
requirements.text: Controller::send with Command.type=CommandType::Watchdog shall return ResponseStatus::OK and shall not return an error.

requirements.title: CommandType::Reset is accepted without error
requirements.text: Controller::send with Command.type=CommandType::Reset shall return ResponseStatus::OK and shall not return an error.

requirements.title: Handler Response is returned verbatim
requirements.text: When a Handler is configured, the Response returned by the handler shall be returned directly by Controller::send without modification.

requirements.title: Publish on a closed controller does not crash
requirements.text: Calling publish on a controller after Controller::close shall not throw or crash.

requirements.title: Concurrent send calls are data-race free
requirements.text: Multiple concurrent calls to Controller::send on the same controller shall be free of data races.

requirements.title: Concurrent publish and subscribe are data-race free
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to publish and subscribe on the same controller shall be free of data races.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel carries the correct Zone
requirements.text: Every Status received on a subscribe channel shall carry a zone field equal to the subscribing Controller's zone.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel carries correct Payload
requirements.text: Status.payload on each received update shall be byte-for-byte identical to the payload argument of the publish call that produced it.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel carries healthy=true for open controller
requirements.text: Status.healthy shall be true on every update published while the controller is open.

requirements.title: Done context does not invoke handler
requirements.text: If the Context passed to send is already done, the Handler shall not be invoked.

requirements.title: Send with empty payload does not crash
requirements.text: Controller::send with an empty Command.payload shall not throw or crash.

requirements.title: Controller::send rejects commands whose zone does not match the controller zone
requirements.text: Controller::send shall return ErrZoneMismatch when cmd.zone does not equal the zone declared by the controller.

requirements.title: Controller::send copies Command.payload before passing to the handler
requirements.text: Controller::send shall copy Command.payload before invoking the handler. Subsequent modification of the original payload by the caller shall not affect the bytes seen by the handler.

requirements.title: Controller::publish copies the payload before embedding in Status
requirements.text: Controller::publish shall copy the payload argument before embedding it in the Status value delivered to subscribers.

requirements.title: new_registry pre-populates all five standard zones
requirements.text: A Registry returned by mock::new_registry shall contain controllers for Zone::FrontLeft, FrontRight, RearLeft, RearRight, and Central.

requirements.title: Duplicate zone registration returns ErrAlreadyExists
requirements.text: Registry::register_ctrl for a zone that already has a registered controller shall return ErrAlreadyExists.

requirements.title: Deregister removes the zone and closes its controller
requirements.text: Registry::deregister shall remove the controller for the given zone and call close on it. After deregistration, lookup for the same zone shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Lookup returns ErrNotFound for an absent zone
requirements.text: Registry::lookup for a zone with no registered controller shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registry::close is idempotent
requirements.text: Registry::close shall be safe to call multiple times. Every call after the first shall succeed without side effects.

requirements.title: Controllers returns all currently registered controllers
requirements.text: Registry::controllers shall return exactly the set of controllers currently registered, with no duplicates and no omissions.

requirements.title: Register rejected after Registry::close
requirements.text: Registry::register_ctrl called after Registry::close shall return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Deregister returns ErrNotFound for a zone that was never registered
requirements.text: Registry::deregister for a zone with no registered controller shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registered controller is immediately retrievable via lookup
requirements.text: After a successful Registry::register_ctrl call, Registry::lookup for the same zone shall return the registered controller without error.

requirements.title: Registry::close calls close on all registered controllers
requirements.text: Registry::close shall call close on every controller currently registered before returning.

requirements.title: Lookup on a closed Registry returns an error
requirements.text: Registry::lookup called after Registry::close shall return a non-success error_code.

requirements.title: Deregister for an already-deregistered zone returns ErrNotFound
requirements.text: A second call to Registry::deregister for a zone that was already deregistered shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registry::lookup returns ErrClosed when called on a closed registry
requirements.text: Registry::lookup called after Registry::close shall return ErrClosed specifically, not ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Header magic bytes 'RC'
requirements.text: All wire frames shall begin with the two-byte sequence 0x52 ('R'), 0x43 ('C').

requirements.title: Protocol version field
requirements.text: All wire frames shall carry the protocol version (currently 0x01) in byte 2.

requirements.title: Message type field
requirements.text: Byte 3 of every wire frame shall encode the message type: Command, Response, Status, Subscribe, or Unsubscribe.

requirements.title: Zone field
requirements.text: Bytes 4 of every wire frame shall encode the target Zone as a uint8.

requirements.title: CommandType field for commands
requirements.text: Bytes 5–6 of Command frames shall encode the CommandType as a big-endian uint16.

requirements.title: Priority/Status field
requirements.text: Byte 7 shall encode Priority for Command frames, ResponseStatus for Response frames, and Healthy flag for Status frames.

requirements.title: Command/response ID field
requirements.text: Bytes 8–11 shall encode the Command or Response ID as a big-endian uint32.

requirements.title: Payload length field
requirements.text: Bytes 12–15 shall encode the payload byte count as a big-endian uint32.

requirements.title: Payload follows header
requirements.text: The variable-length payload shall immediately follow the 16-byte header.

requirements.title: Big-endian multi-byte fields
requirements.text: All multi-byte fields in wire frames shall be encoded in big-endian (network) byte order.

requirements.title: Frame validation rejects bad magic
requirements.text: The decoder shall return an error if frame bytes 0–1 are not 0x52, 0x43.

requirements.title: Frame validation rejects bad version
requirements.text: The decoder shall return an error if the version byte does not equal the supported protocol version.

requirements.title: E2E header prepended to payload
requirements.text: The e2e::wrap() function shall prepend a 6-byte header (4-byte seq + 2-byte CRC-16) to the payload.

requirements.title: Sequence counter increments per send
requirements.text: Each call to e2e::Controller::send() shall increment the sequence counter atomically.

requirements.title: CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE algorithm
requirements.text: The CRC shall be computed using the CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE polynomial (0x1021, init 0xFFFF).

requirements.title: CRC covers seq and payload
requirements.text: The CRC-16 shall cover both the 4-byte sequence number and the entire payload.

requirements.title: Unwrap validates CRC
requirements.text: e2e::unwrap() shall return E2EErrc::crc_mismatch if the CRC in the frame does not match the computed CRC.

requirements.title: Unwrap rejects short frames
requirements.text: e2e::unwrap() shall return E2EErrc::short_frame if the frame is shorter than HeaderLen bytes.

requirements.title: ReplayGuard rejects duplicate seq
requirements.text: ReplayGuard::check() shall return E2EErrc::replay for any sequence number that was already accepted within the window.

requirements.title: ReplayGuard rejects old seq outside window
requirements.text: ReplayGuard::check() shall return E2EErrc::replay for sequence numbers more than ReplayWindowSize behind the current high-water mark.

requirements.title: Keeper kicks all zones periodically
requirements.text: watchdog::Keeper shall send a CmdWatchdog command to every registered zone controller at the configured interval.

requirements.title: Zone starts Healthy
requirements.text: A zone controller shall be in the Healthy state immediately after Keeper construction.

requirements.title: Degraded after degrade_after misses
requirements.text: A zone controller shall transition to Degraded after degrade_after consecutive kick failures.

requirements.title: Faulted after fault_after misses
requirements.text: A zone controller shall transition to Faulted after fault_after consecutive kick failures.

requirements.title: Recovery to Healthy on success
requirements.text: A zone controller shall transition back to Healthy on the next successful kick after any degraded or faulted state.

requirements.title: Callback fires on transition
requirements.text: The health callback shall be invoked with the new HealthState whenever a zone's health state changes.

requirements.title: Kick timeout respected
requirements.text: Each kick shall use a Context with the configured timeout; a timeout response shall count as a miss.

requirements.title: Close stops background thread
requirements.text: Keeper::close() shall cause the background kick thread to terminate without hanging.

requirements.title: Monitor subscribes to all zones
requirements.text: deadline::Monitor shall subscribe to each registered zone controller's Status stream on construction.

requirements.title: Dead event on initial deadline
requirements.text: The monitor shall emit LivenessEvent{alive=false} for any zone that does not publish a Status within the configured deadline, including the very first deadline period.

requirements.title: Repeated dead events suppressed
requirements.text: The monitor shall not re-emit LivenessEvent{alive=false} for a zone that is already known to be dead.

requirements.title: Alive event on first status
requirements.text: The monitor shall emit LivenessEvent{alive=true} when the first Status arrives for a previously-dead zone.

requirements.title: Deadline timer resets on status
requirements.text: Receipt of a Status shall reset the per-zone deadline timer.

requirements.title: alive() returns false before first status
requirements.text: Monitor::alive(z) shall return false for any zone that has not yet published a Status.

requirements.title: Close terminates watch threads
requirements.text: Monitor::close() shall signal all watch threads to stop.

requirements.title: Destructor joins threads
requirements.text: The Monitor destructor shall join all watch threads before returning.

requirements.title: sleep() sends CmdSleep
requirements.text: powerstate::Manager::sleep() shall send CommandType::Sleep to the target zone.

requirements.title: sleep() transitions Active→Sleeping
requirements.text: A successful sleep() call shall transition the zone from Active to Sleeping.

requirements.title: wake() sends CmdWake
requirements.text: powerstate::Manager::wake() shall send CommandType::Wake to the target zone.

requirements.title: wake() transitions Sleeping→Active
requirements.text: A successful wake() call shall transition the zone from Sleeping or BusOff to Active.

requirements.title: Command failure yields BusOff
requirements.text: A send error during sleep() or wake() shall transition the zone to BusOff.

requirements.title: recover_loop retries BusOff zones
requirements.text: The background recovery loop shall periodically attempt wake() for every zone in the BusOff state.

requirements.title: state() is thread-safe
requirements.text: powerstate::Manager::state(z) shall be safe to call concurrently with sleep(), wake(), or the recovery loop.

requirements.title: Close stops recovery loop
requirements.text: Manager::close() shall stop the background recovery thread without hanging.

requirements.title: Higher priority dispatched first
requirements.text: prioqueue::Controller shall dispatch Priority::Critical before Priority::High before Priority::Normal when multiple commands are queued.

requirements.title: FIFO within same priority
requirements.text: Commands with equal priority shall be dispatched in the order they were submitted (first-in, first-out).

requirements.title: Deadline respected per entry
requirements.text: If a queued command's context deadline expires before dispatch, send() shall return ErrTimeout.

requirements.title: done() context rejected
requirements.text: send() shall return ErrTimeout immediately if the provided context is already done.

requirements.title: Zone mismatch rejected
requirements.text: send() shall return ErrZoneMismatch if cmd.zone differs from the inner controller's zone.

requirements.title: Subscribe delegates to inner
requirements.text: subscribe() shall delegate directly to the inner controller.

requirements.title: Close stops dispatch thread
requirements.text: close() shall stop the dispatch thread and cause subsequent send() calls to return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: send() after close returns ErrClosed
requirements.text: Any send() call after close() shall return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Token bucket with configurable rate and burst
requirements.text: ratelimit::Controller shall implement a token bucket with configurable rate (tokens/s) and burst capacity.

requirements.title: Tokens refilled based on elapsed time
requirements.text: The token bucket shall refill tokens proportionally to elapsed wall-clock time since the last take().

requirements.title: ErrBusy when bucket exhausted
requirements.text: send() shall return ErrBusy immediately, without calling inner send(), when fewer than 1 token remains.

requirements.title: Critical commands exempt when configured
requirements.text: When Config::exempt_critical is true, Priority::Critical commands shall bypass the token bucket.

requirements.title: Non-critical commands not exempt
requirements.text: Priority::Normal and Priority::High commands shall always be subject to the token bucket.

requirements.title: Zone mismatch rejected
requirements.text: send() shall return ErrZoneMismatch if cmd.zone differs from the inner controller's zone.

requirements.title: Close stops sends
requirements.text: close() shall cause subsequent send() calls to return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: send() after close returns ErrClosed
requirements.text: Any send() call after close() shall return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: send() returns OK by default
requirements.text: sim::Controller::send() shall return ResponseStatus::OK unless a fault has been injected.

requirements.title: zone() returns configured zone
requirements.text: sim::Controller::zone() shall return the Zone value from the Config struct.

requirements.title: Constant latency model
requirements.text: When LatencyModel::Constant is configured, send() shall sleep for exactly base_latency before returning.

requirements.title: Jitter latency model
requirements.text: When LatencyModel::Jitter is configured, send() shall sleep for a duration uniformly distributed in [base_latency, base_latency + jitter].

requirements.title: fault() causes send to fail
requirements.text: fault(ec) shall cause all subsequent send() calls to return ec instead of delegating to the handler.

requirements.title: recover() restores normal operation
requirements.text: recover() shall clear any injected fault and restore send() to OK responses.

requirements.title: Status published on interval
requirements.text: If Config::status_interval > 0, the simulator shall publish a Status on that cadence to all subscribers.

requirements.title: close() stops background threads
requirements.text: close() shall terminate the status and watchdog background threads without hanging.

requirements.title: No fault when no rules
requirements.text: When no rules are active, send() shall delegate to the inner controller unchanged.

requirements.title: Drop rule returns error without calling inner
requirements.text: A Drop rule shall cause send() to return an error without calling the inner controller.

requirements.title: Error rule returns ResponseStatus::Error
requirements.text: An Error rule shall return {} (no error code) with the Response status set to ResponseStatus::Error.

requirements.title: Slow rule adds configured latency
requirements.text: A Slow rule shall sleep for Rule::latency before delegating to the inner controller.

requirements.title: Count-based rule expires after N firings
requirements.text: A rule with count > 0 shall auto-expire after count applications and be removed from the active list.

requirements.title: clear_rules() removes all active rules
requirements.text: clear_rules() shall remove all rules, returning the controller to pass-through mode.

requirements.title: Timeout rule returns ErrTimeout
requirements.text: A Timeout rule shall return ErrTimeout without calling the inner controller.

requirements.title: zone() delegates to inner
requirements.text: zone() shall return the inner controller's zone.

requirements.title: loan() returns zeroed buffer
requirements.text: loan::Controller::loan(n) shall return a zeroed byte vector of exactly n bytes.

requirements.title: loan() returns ErrClosed when closed
requirements.text: loan() shall return ErrClosed if the controller has been closed.

requirements.title: loan() returns error for negative size
requirements.text: loan() shall return an error if size < 0.

requirements.title: send_loaned() delegates to inner
requirements.text: send_loaned() shall delegate command delivery to the inner controller.

requirements.title: Loan RAII releases buffer to pool
requirements.text: When a Loan is destroyed without being sent, its destructor shall return the buffer to the pool.

requirements.title: zone() delegates to inner
requirements.text: zone() shall return the inner controller's zone.

requirements.title: Mutual TLS authentication
requirements.text: TLS transport shall require both client and server to present valid X.509 certificates.

requirements.title: Certificate verification by CA
requirements.text: Certificates shall be verified against the configured CA bundle; self-signed certs shall be rejected unless the CA is the cert itself.

requirements.title: Config::verify_peer=true by default
requirements.text: Certificate verification shall be enabled by default.

requirements.title: PEM file support
requirements.text: cert_file, key_file, and ca_file shall accept paths to PEM-formatted files.

requirements.title: Command frames encrypted
requirements.text: All Command and Response frames shall be encrypted in transit.

requirements.title: Status frames encrypted
requirements.text: All Status subscription frames shall be encrypted in transit.

requirements.title: TLS 1.2+ enforced
requirements.text: Connections with TLS protocol version below 1.2 shall be rejected.

requirements.title: Weak cipher suites disabled
requirements.text: NULL, RC4, EXPORT, and DES cipher suites shall be disabled.

requirements.title: close() terminates TLS session
requirements.text: close() shall perform a clean TLS shutdown before closing the underlying socket.

requirements.title: Error propagation
requirements.text: Any TLS handshake or I/O error shall be returned as a std::error_code to the caller.

requirements.title: In-process zero-copy delivery
requirements.text: shmem::Controller::send() shall deliver commands to the ZoneServer without serialising to a byte buffer.

requirements.title: Custom handler invoked
requirements.text: If set_handler() has been called, the handler shall be invoked for each command; otherwise a default OK response is returned.

requirements.title: ErrZoneMismatch on wrong zone
requirements.text: send() shall return ErrZoneMismatch if cmd.zone differs from the server's zone.

requirements.title: ErrClosed after close()
requirements.text: send() shall return ErrClosed after the Controller or ZoneServer has been closed.

requirements.title: publish() delivers to all subscribers
requirements.text: ZoneServer::publish() shall push the Status to every active StatusChannel.

requirements.title: Payload copied before handler
requirements.text: The controller shall copy the Command payload before passing it to the ZoneServer handler.

requirements.title: Registry lookup finds registered server
requirements.text: shmem::Registry::lookup() shall return the controller for a zone registered via add_server().

requirements.title: Registry::close() releases all controllers
requirements.text: Registry::close() shall close all registered controllers and cause subsequent lookup() to return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: SO_PRIORITY set per command priority
requirements.text: tsn::Controller::send() shall set the SO_PRIORITY socket option proportional to the command's rcp::Priority before sending.

requirements.title: PCPMap maps Normal/High/Critical to PCP values
requirements.text: The PCPMap struct shall provide separate PCP values for Priority::Normal, Priority::High, and Priority::Critical.

requirements.title: Critical mapped to highest PCP
requirements.text: Priority::Critical shall be mapped to PCP 7 by default.

requirements.title: High mapped to mid-range PCP
requirements.text: Priority::High shall be mapped to PCP 5 by default.

requirements.title: Normal mapped to low PCP
requirements.text: Priority::Normal shall be mapped to PCP 2 by default.

requirements.title: subscribe() delegates to inner
requirements.text: subscribe() shall delegate directly to the inner controller without modifying socket priority.

requirements.title: Discoverer interface for zone discovery
requirements.text: mdns::Discoverer shall define the abstract interface for mDNS-based zone controller discovery.

requirements.title: start() fires Added event for each discovered zone
requirements.text: Discoverer::start() shall invoke the callback with EventType::Added for each discovered ZoneInfo.

requirements.title: stop() terminates discovery
requirements.text: Discoverer::stop() shall cause the discoverer to stop emitting events.

requirements.title: StaticDiscoverer emits configured zones
requirements.text: StaticDiscoverer::start() shall emit all configured ZoneInfo entries synchronously before returning.

requirements.title: ZoneInfo carries host, port, and zone
requirements.text: ZoneInfo shall carry the Zone, host string, port number, and service instance name.

requirements.title: instance_name follows _rcp._udp.local convention
requirements.text: make_instance_name() shall produce names of the form '<zone>.<host>._rcp._udp.local'.

requirements.title: Announcer interface for zone registration
requirements.text: mdns::Announcer shall define the abstract interface for announcing zone controllers via the local mDNS responder.

requirements.title: withdraw() removes mDNS record
requirements.text: Announcer::withdraw(z) shall remove the mDNS record for the given zone.

requirements.title: AuthController enforces AccessPolicy on every send
requirements.text: AuthController.send() shall check the presented Identity against the AccessPolicy before forwarding any Command. If the identity is not permitted, ErrForbidden shall be returned without invoking the inner controller.

requirements.title: Empty zone/type set means all allowed
requirements.text: A PolicyEntry with an empty zones set shall permit any Zone. A PolicyEntry with an empty cmd_types set shall permit any CommandType.

requirements.title: Identity resolver takes precedence over set_identity
requirements.text: If an IdentityFn is supplied to AuthController, it shall be called on each send() and its result shall be used as the caller identity, superseding any value set via set_identity().

requirements.title: AccessPolicy is thread-safe
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to AccessPolicy::allow() and AccessPolicy::permit() from different threads shall not result in data races.

requirements.title: AuthController::zone() delegates to inner
requirements.text: AuthController::zone() shall return the same zone as the wrapped inner controller.

requirements.title: AuthController::subscribe() delegates to inner
requirements.text: AuthController::subscribe() shall forward the call to the inner controller unchanged.

requirements.title: AuthController::close() delegates to inner
requirements.text: AuthController::close() shall forward the call to the inner controller and return its error code.

requirements.title: ErrForbidden is a distinct error code
requirements.text: authz::ErrForbidden shall be a non-zero std::error_code distinct from all other rcp error codes.

requirements.title: FirmwareSession begins in Idle state
requirements.text: A freshly constructed FirmwareSession shall report SessionState::Idle.

requirements.title: initiate transitions to Initiated
requirements.text: FirmwareSession::initiate() shall transition the session to SessionState::Initiated on success.

requirements.title: transfer requires Initiated state
requirements.text: FirmwareSession::transfer() shall return FirmwareErrc::bad_state if the session is not in Initiated state.

requirements.title: verify requires Transferring state
requirements.text: FirmwareSession::verify() shall return FirmwareErrc::bad_state if the session is not in Transferring state.

requirements.title: activate requires Verifying state
requirements.text: FirmwareSession::activate() shall return FirmwareErrc::bad_state if the session is not in Verifying state.

requirements.title: transfer chunks firmware in Config::chunk_size segments
requirements.text: FirmwareSession::transfer() shall send the image in segments not exceeding Config::chunk_size bytes.

requirements.title: rollback resets session to Idle
requirements.text: FirmwareSession::rollback() shall reset the session state to Idle on success.

requirements.title: transfer progress callback is called per chunk
requirements.text: If a ProgressCallback is supplied, FirmwareSession::transfer() shall invoke it once for each chunk successfully delivered.

requirements.title: ZoneGroup::all() contains all five zones
requirements.text: ZoneGroup::all() shall return a group containing Zone::FrontLeft, FrontRight, RearLeft, RearRight, and Central.

requirements.title: send_group dispatches to every zone concurrently
requirements.text: GroupRegistry::send_group() shall dispatch the command to all zones in the group using independent asynchronous tasks.

requirements.title: GroupResponse::ok() is false if any zone fails
requirements.text: GroupResponse::ok() shall return false if any per-zone result has a non-zero error_code.

requirements.title: GroupResponse::errors() lists failing zones
requirements.text: GroupResponse::errors() shall return the set of zones for which the error_code is non-zero.

requirements.title: ZoneGroup is a value type
requirements.text: ZoneGroup shall be copyable and default-constructible.

requirements.title: send_group uses caller context deadline
requirements.text: GroupRegistry::send_group() shall forward the caller's Context (including deadline) to each zone controller.

requirements.title: ProxyController enforces latency budget
requirements.text: ProxyController::send() shall derive a tighter deadline equal to min(caller deadline, now + latency_budget) and forward that to the upstream controller.

requirements.title: ProxyRegistry::lookup returns proxy-wrapped controller
requirements.text: Controllers added via ProxyRegistry::add_route() shall be wrapped in a ProxyController before being returned by lookup().

requirements.title: ProxyRegistry::deregister closes upstream
requirements.text: ProxyRegistry::deregister() shall call close() on the removed controller.

requirements.title: ProxyRegistry returns ErrNotFound for unknown zones
requirements.text: ProxyRegistry::lookup() shall return ErrNotFound for zones not registered via add_route().

requirements.title: ProxyRegistry close is idempotent
requirements.text: Calling ProxyRegistry::close() more than once shall return no error on subsequent calls.

requirements.title: ProxyController zone() matches upstream
requirements.text: ProxyController::zone() shall return the same zone as the wrapped upstream controller.

requirements.title: RedundantController routes sends to primary
requirements.text: RedundantController::send() shall forward commands to the primary controller when it is active.

requirements.title: RedundantController promotes standby on ErrClosed
requirements.text: When the primary returns ErrClosed and auto_promote is true, RedundantController shall promote the standby and retry.

requirements.title: RedundantController promotes standby on ErrTimeout
requirements.text: When the primary returns ErrTimeout and auto_promote is true, RedundantController shall promote the standby and retry.

requirements.title: promote() is manually invocable
requirements.text: RedundantController::promote() shall switch the active controller between primary and standby.

requirements.title: is_primary_active reflects current active
requirements.text: RedundantController::is_primary_active() shall return true when primary is active and false when standby is active.

requirements.title: close() closes both controllers
requirements.text: RedundantController::close() shall call close() on both the primary and standby controllers.

requirements.title: auto_promote=false disables automatic failover
requirements.text: When Config::auto_promote is false, RedundantController::send() shall not switch to standby on primary failure.

requirements.title: zone() returns zone of active controller
requirements.text: RedundantController::zone() shall return the zone of the currently active controller.

requirements.title: FederatedRegistry prefers local over remote lease
requirements.text: When both a local controller and a remote lease exist for the same zone, FederatedRegistry::lookup() shall return the local controller.

requirements.title: Expired lease returns ErrNotFound
requirements.text: FederatedRegistry::lookup() shall return ErrNotFound for a zone whose only entry is an expired Lease.

requirements.title: revoke_lease removes lease immediately
requirements.text: FederatedRegistry::revoke_lease() shall remove the lease so that subsequent lookup() calls return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: add_lease stores lease for valid zone
requirements.text: FederatedRegistry::add_lease() shall store the lease so that lookup() returns the remote controller until the lease expires.

requirements.title: local_id identifies the HPC node
requirements.text: FederatedRegistry::local_id() shall return the identifier supplied at construction.

requirements.title: close() closes local and remote controllers
requirements.text: FederatedRegistry::close() shall close all local controllers and all remote_ctrl handles in active leases.

requirements.title: closed registry returns ErrClosed on lookup
requirements.text: After FederatedRegistry::close(), lookup() shall return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: register_ctrl returns ErrAlreadyExists for duplicate zone
requirements.text: FederatedRegistry::register_ctrl() shall return ErrAlreadyExists if a controller for that zone is already registered locally.

requirements.title: ObservingController records a span per send
requirements.text: ObservingController::send() shall record one Span for every call to the underlying controller.

requirements.title: Span captures zone and command type
requirements.text: The Span recorded by ObservingController shall include the Command zone and CommandType.

requirements.title: Span duration is non-negative
requirements.text: The duration() of every recorded Span shall be ≥ 0 microseconds.

requirements.title: Span captures error code
requirements.text: The Span result field shall reflect the error_code returned by the inner controller.

requirements.title: NoopSink does not crash on any metric
requirements.text: NoopSink::record_span(), record_gauge(), and record_counter() shall be no-ops that do not throw.

requirements.title: InMemorySink is thread-safe
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to InMemorySink::record_span() and spans() from different threads shall not result in data races.

requirements.title: ObservingController increments rcp.commands.total counter
requirements.text: ObservingController::send() shall call record_counter('rcp.commands.total') once per send.

requirements.title: ObservingController increments error counter on failure
requirements.text: When send() returns a non-zero error_code, ObservingController shall also call record_counter('rcp.commands.errors').

requirements.title: AdminServer::zones() returns all registered controllers
requirements.text: AdminServer::zones() shall return one ZoneInfo entry for every controller registered in the wrapped Registry.

requirements.title: AdminServer broadcasts events to all subscribers
requirements.text: AdminServer::emit() shall invoke every registered EventCallback with the supplied Event.

requirements.title: AdminServer::metrics_text outputs Prometheus format
requirements.text: AdminServer::metrics_text() shall return a string containing TYPE and metric lines in Prometheus text exposition format.

requirements.title: record_counter accumulates delta values
requirements.text: Multiple calls to AdminServer::record_counter() for the same name+labels shall accumulate the delta values.

requirements.title: AdminServer is thread-safe
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to AdminServer::subscribe(), emit(), and metrics_text() shall not result in data races.

requirements.title: ZoneInfo.registered is true for all listed zones
requirements.text: All ZoneInfo entries returned by AdminServer::zones() shall have registered = true.

requirements.title: Multiple subscribers all receive each event
requirements.text: If N subscribers are registered, AdminServer::emit() shall invoke all N callbacks for each event.

requirements.title: EventCallback receives event with correct type and zone
requirements.text: The Event passed to each EventCallback shall have the EventType and Zone specified in the emit() call.

requirements.title: RecordingController captures command and response
requirements.text: RecordingController::send() shall append one Entry to the Record containing the Command, Response, and error_code for every send call.

requirements.title: Record::size() reflects number of sent commands
requirements.text: Record::size() shall equal the total number of completed send() calls through the RecordingController.

requirements.title: Record::write_binary creates a non-empty file
requirements.text: Record::write_binary() shall create a file at the specified path, write all captured entries, and return no error.

requirements.title: Playback::run_all replays all entries
requirements.text: Playback::run_all() shall send one command for every entry in the Record to the target controller.

requirements.title: Playback with speed_factor=0 skips inter-entry delays
requirements.text: When PlaybackConfig::speed_factor is 0.0, Playback::run_all() shall not sleep between entries.

requirements.title: Entry timestamp_ns is monotonically increasing
requirements.text: The timestamp_ns fields of consecutive entries in a Record shall be non-decreasing.

requirements.title: RecordingController forwards send result unchanged
requirements.text: RecordingController::send() shall return the same error_code as the inner controller.

requirements.title: Record is thread-safe for concurrent appends
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to Record::append() from different threads shall not result in data races.

requirements.title: parse_json extracts zone entries
requirements.text: config::parse_json() shall return a Manifest containing one ZoneManifestEntry for each object with a 'zone' key in the input JSON.

requirements.title: parse_json throws ParseError for unknown zones
requirements.text: config::parse_json() shall throw config::ParseError if the 'zone' string value does not match a known Zone name.

requirements.title: parse_json extracts priority field
requirements.text: config::parse_json() shall populate ZoneManifestEntry::priority from the 'priority' JSON field when present.

requirements.title: config::load registers controllers in registry
requirements.text: config::load() shall call registry.register_ctrl() for each zone defined in the manifest.

requirements.title: config::load returns ErrAlreadyExists for duplicate zones
requirements.text: config::load() shall return ErrAlreadyExists if the manifest defines the same zone more than once.

requirements.title: ParseError is a std::runtime_error subclass
requirements.text: config::ParseError shall be derived from std::runtime_error so it can be caught with a standard exception handler.

requirements.title: SchemaRegistry::add rejects duplicate IDs
requirements.text: SchemaRegistry::add() shall return ErrAlreadyExists if a SchemaEntry with the same ID is already registered.

requirements.title: SchemaRegistry::lookup returns false for unknown IDs
requirements.text: SchemaRegistry::lookup() shall return false without modifying the output parameter if the schema ID is not found.

requirements.title: DynamicPayload::encode prepends schema_id big-endian
requirements.text: DynamicPayload::encode() shall produce a vector whose first 4 bytes are the schema_id in big-endian order, followed by the data bytes.

requirements.title: DynamicPayload::decode round-trips encode output
requirements.text: DynamicPayload::decode(dp.encode()) shall produce a DynamicPayload with the same schema_id and data as the original.

requirements.title: decode of short buffer returns zero schema_id
requirements.text: DynamicPayload::decode() on a buffer of fewer than 4 bytes shall return a DynamicPayload with schema_id = 0 and empty data.

requirements.title: SchemaRegistry is thread-safe
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to SchemaRegistry::add() and lookup() from different threads shall not result in data races.

requirements.title: GrpcController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: GrpcController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a concrete gRPC adapter is linked.

requirements.title: GrpcController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: GrpcController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: GrpcController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: GrpcController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a concrete gRPC adapter is linked.

requirements.title: GrpcController::close returns no error
requirements.text: GrpcController::close() shall return a zero error_code (stub has no resources to release).

requirements.title: RestController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: RestController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until an HTTP client adapter is linked.

requirements.title: RestController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: RestController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: RestController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: RestController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until an HTTP adapter is linked.

requirements.title: RestController::close returns no error
requirements.text: RestController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: SomeIpController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: SomeIpController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a vsomeip adapter is linked.

requirements.title: SomeIpController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: SomeIpController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: SomeIpController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: SomeIpController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a vsomeip adapter is linked.

requirements.title: SomeIpController::close returns no error
requirements.text: SomeIpController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: CanController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: CanController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a SocketCAN adapter is linked.

requirements.title: CanController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: CanController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: CanController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: CanController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a SocketCAN adapter is linked.

requirements.title: CanController::close returns no error
requirements.text: CanController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: DdsController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: DdsController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a DDS adapter is linked.

requirements.title: DdsController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: DdsController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: DdsController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: DdsController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a DDS adapter is linked.

requirements.title: DdsController::close returns no error
requirements.text: DdsController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: MqttController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: MqttController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a Paho adapter is linked.

requirements.title: MqttController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: MqttController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: MqttController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: MqttController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a Paho adapter is linked.

requirements.title: MqttController::close returns no error
requirements.text: MqttController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: LinController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: LinController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a LIN driver adapter is linked.

requirements.title: LinController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: LinController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: LinController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: LinController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a LIN adapter is linked.

requirements.title: LinController::close returns no error
requirements.text: LinController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: UdsController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: UdsController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a UDS stack adapter is linked.

requirements.title: UdsController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: UdsController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: UdsController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: UdsController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a UDS adapter is linked.

requirements.title: UdsController::close returns no error
requirements.text: UdsController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: DoIpController::send returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: DoIpController::send() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a DoIP stack adapter is linked.

requirements.title: DoIpController::zone returns configured zone
requirements.text: DoIpController::zone() shall return the zone supplied at construction.

requirements.title: DoIpController::subscribe returns function_not_supported when stub
requirements.text: DoIpController::subscribe() shall return std::errc::function_not_supported until a DoIP adapter is linked.

requirements.title: DoIpController::close returns no error
requirements.text: DoIpController::close() shall return a zero error_code.

requirements.title: rcp_registry_init succeeds with adequate buffer
requirements.text: rcp_registry_init() shall return RCP_OK when supplied a buffer of at least rcp_registry_sizeof() bytes.

requirements.title: rcp_registry_init fails with small buffer
requirements.text: rcp_registry_init() shall return RCP_ERR_NOMEM when the buffer is smaller than rcp_registry_sizeof().

requirements.title: rcp_ctrl_init succeeds with adequate buffer
requirements.text: rcp_ctrl_init() shall return RCP_OK and populate the output handle when supplied a buffer of at least rcp_ctrl_sizeof() bytes.

requirements.title: rcp_ctrl_init fails with small buffer
requirements.text: rcp_ctrl_init() shall return RCP_ERR_NOMEM when the buffer is smaller than rcp_ctrl_sizeof().

requirements.title: rcp_registry_add registers a controller
requirements.text: rcp_registry_add() shall add the controller to the registry and return RCP_OK.

requirements.title: rcp_send returns RCP_OK on success
requirements.text: rcp_send() shall return RCP_OK and populate rcp_response_t when the inner controller succeeds within the timeout.

requirements.title: rcp_send with null ctrl returns RCP_ERR_INVALID
requirements.text: rcp_send() shall return RCP_ERR_INVALID when ctrl, cmd, or resp is NULL.

requirements.title: sizeof queries return non-zero values
requirements.text: rcp_registry_sizeof() and rcp_ctrl_sizeof() shall each return a value greater than zero.
